required_preferences.fact: Slows down mornings as needed; some days opts for a brief stretching routine or meditation instead of a walk per doctor’s orders—prioritizes stress management over rigid exercise routines

supersedes.fact: Starts each morning with a two-mile walk before opening shop—never sleeps in on business days

required_preferences.fact: Extends avoidance to all processed meats and cheese snacks from the shop during shifts; keeps raw veggies, unsalted nuts, and fruit at the counter instead

supersedes.fact: Avoids eating salty snacks and baked goods from his own shop during shifts—keeps unsalted nuts and fruit at the counter instead

required_preferences.fact: Follows a daily log of chest symptoms and fatigue as instructed for cardiac monitoring—keeps the notebook at the counter and updates immediately if he notices changes
Schedules family activities at least two weeks in advance—never spontaneous outings
Texts sons for quick updates about chores at the shop; rarely calls unless urgent
Sets a hard cutoff for caffeine after 3pm—never drinks coffee in the evening to improve sleep

persona: A small business owner managing payroll for five employees
